note: Investor-relations landing page for Verizon annual reports and Form 10-K materials.

title: Verizon
note: Official consumer entry point for Verizon wireless, internet, and account services.

note: Official product page for Verizon's Fios fiber internet service.

note: Reported Verizon market capitalization of about $201.55 billion as of May 21, 2026.

title: Open5GS Documentation
note: Documents Open5GS as an open-source implementation of 4G EPC and 5G Core network functions.

title: Magma
note: Open-source packet-core project relevant to lower-cost and more flexible mobile network deployments.

title: O-RAN Alliance
note: Standards and ecosystem source for open RAN interfaces and disaggregated radio-access network architecture.

title: OpenWrt Project
note: Open-source router operating system relevant to user-controlled customer-premises networking equipment.

title: LibreMesh
note: Open-source community mesh networking project relevant to decentralized local broadband alternatives.
